name: OpenClaw
description: Send messages to another OpenClaw (n8n-claw) agent instance on a remote server and receive responses

credentials_required.label: OpenClaw Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of the remote n8n-claw instance (e.g. https://n8n.example.com)

credentials_required.label: OpenClaw Webhook API Key
credentials_required.hint: The WEBHOOK_SECRET of the remote instance (X-API-Key header value)

tools.name: openclaw_send_message
tools.description: Send a message to another OpenClaw agent instance and get the response

author: freddy-schuetz
